generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
network: Network error. Check your connection and retry.
unauthorized: Session expired. Please sign in again.
forbidden: You don't have permission to perform this action.
notFound: We couldn't find what you were looking for.
notFoundBody: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved. Let's get you back on track.
rateLimit: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
serverError: Our servers are having a moment. We're on it.
accountLocked: Your account is temporarily locked after too many attempts. Please try again later.
accountInactive: This account isn't active. Please contact support.

boundary.title: Something went wrong
boundary.description: An unexpected error occurred. Reload the page to continue. If the problem persists, please contact support.

maintenance.title: Down for maintenance
maintenance.description: The platform is temporarily offline while we make improvements. We'll be back shortly.
